pi_items.source: Matches task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh TARGET_FILE variables.
Matches WIN_TARGET_FILE in export_result.sh and task description instructions.
Matches the dataset requested in the task description instructions. It is a default sample dataset in Oracle Analytics Desktop.
Matches the visualization type requested in the task description and checked via 'vizType="map"' in verifier.py.
Matches the location dimension requested in the task description for the First Layer, and verified by regex in verifier.py.
Matches the color measure requested in the task description for the First Layer, and verified by regex in verifier.py.
Matches the location dimension requested in the task description for the Second Layer, and verified by regex in verifier.py.
Matches the size/color measure requested in the task description for the Second Layer, and verified by regex in verifier.py.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly require the creation of an Oracle Analytics Desktop workbook named 'Geospatial_Analysis.dva' at 'C:\\Users\\Docker\\Documents\\Geospatial_Analysis.dva', using the default 'Sample Order Lines' dataset. The required map visualization configuration is verified to be: a base 'State' layer colored by 'Sales', and an overlaid 'City' layer sized/colored by 'Profit'. These values exactly match the verifier script expectations and task prompt.
